title: Torrezx-Blaze rework
description: better model,texture and animation to blaze
body:
Torrezx-Blaze rework

ESPAÑOL

El poderoso blaze a sido mejorado,y ahora posee flamas flotantes y un aspecto mas demoniaco

ahora desafialo y destruye a esta bestia poderosa de las profundidades del Nether.Optifine requiere

 
ENGLISH

The powerful blaze has been improved, and now has floating flames and a more demonic appearance

now challenge him and destroy this powerful beast from the depths of the Nether.Optifine requires
